verses.gurmukhi: ਅਨੰਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
verses.hindi: अनंदु भइआ मेरी माए सतिगुरू मै पाइआ ॥
verses.english: I am in ecstasy, O my mother, for I have found my True Guru.
verses.translation: I am filled with bliss, O my mother, for I have found the True Guru.

verses.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜ ਸੇਤੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਜੀਆ ਵਾਧਾਈਆ ॥
verses.hindi: सतिगुरु त पाइआ सहज सेती मनि वजीआ वाधाईआ ॥
verses.english: I have found the True Guru with intuitive ease, and my mind resounds with the music of bliss.
verses.translation: I found the True Guru with intuitive ease, and the sounds of joy resound in my mind.

verses.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗ ਰਤਨ ਪਰਵਾਰ ਪਰੀਆ ਸਬਦ ਗਾਵਣ ਆਈਆ ॥
verses.hindi: राग रतन परवार परीआ सबद गावण आईआ ॥
verses.english: The jewels of music and the family of celestial beings have come to sing the Word of the Shabad.
verses.translation: The jewels of musical ragas and their accompanying fairies have come to sing the Shabad.

verses.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਤ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਹਰੀ ਕੇਰਾ ਮਨਿ ਜਿਨੀ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
verses.hindi: सबदु त गावहु हरी केरा मनि जिनी वसाइआ ॥
verses.english: So sing the Shabad, the Word of God, if you have enshrined it in your mind.
verses.translation: Sing the Shabad of God, for those who have enshrined it in their minds.

verses.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
verses.hindi: कहै नानकु अनंदु होआ सतिगुरू मै पाइआ ॥१॥
verses.english: Says Nanak, I am in ecstasy, for I have found my True Guru.
verses.translation: Says Nanak, I am in bliss, for I have found the True Guru.
